name: benwu232
body:
# Welcome
My name is Wu, Bin. Call me Ben if you like.


I am a professional engineer in software and FPGA/ASIC design, moreover, a passionate and creative researcher in Machine Learning, Pattern Recognition and Human-Computer Interaction.

# Contact

Email: benwu232@gmail.com

Facebook, Google+, Twitter, Weibo: benwu232

# My projects

## TapMagicPlayer

TapMagic is an experimental technology of using tapping to control hand-held devices. 

TapMagicPlayer is a try of using TapMagic in a real application, which brings a natural and elegant way to control while playing videos. 

I'm sure that TapMagic has a broad range of uses. If you have any idea or suggestion, please let me know. 

Here is the group:
https://groups.google.com/forum/?fromgroups#!forum/tapmagic


## Quantum Phantom
QP is a concept prototype of a new technology, which turns a webcam into a non-touch pointing device that
can directly control the objects on screen, and even draw or write on it. It is based on computer vision,
machine learning and pattern recognition.

The project is here:
https://github.com/benwu232/quantum_phantom

The demo videos are here:

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LUyql0SVobc

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ExE5m6BjnV0

or here:

http://v.youku.com/v_show/id_XMjkyMzg5NzQ4.html

http://v.youku.com/v_show/id_XMjk5NTg5MTQ0.html

and the relevant reports are here:

http://www.engadget.com/2011/08/12/quantum-phantom-prototype-lets-you-control-your-computer-screen/

http://www.geek.com/articles/gadgets/quantum-phantom-styles-itself-after-tony-starks-computer-20110812/

## AGRE
AGRE(Accelerometer based Gesture Recognition Engine) is an experimental project, which analyzes the motion data sampled by Wiimote to recognize gestures of digits and some simple symbols.

The project is here:
https://github.com/benwu232/agre

The demo is here:

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YQqPQQ5sEQY&feature=related
